LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HARRY HOM, BEATRICE HOM, AND, HOGAN AND VEST, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEMURRER TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHOW THE GOVERNING PERIOD IS ONE YEAR AND PLAINTIFF ALLEGES SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT A RENT ORDINANCE VIOLATION UNDER THE APPLICABLE LIBERAL PLEADING STANDARD. THE DEMURRER TO SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE MORE THAN CREATION AND AFFLICTION OF DEBRIS WITH DEFENDANT'S KNOWLEDGE AND PERMISSION. INTENTIONAL INFLECTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS REQUIRES PLEADING OF FACTS CONSTITUTING EXTREME AND OUTRAGEOUS BEHAVIOR TRANSCENDING BOUNDS OF DECENCY. AS DESIRED, PLAINTIFF MAY FILE AND SERVE A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT BY APRIL 27, 2009. IF SHE DOES NOT, DEFENDANTS SHALL FILE AND SERVE THEIR ANSWERS BY APRIL 30, 2009. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: QUENTIN KOPP; COURT REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, CSR, 4280

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HARRY HOM, BEATRICE HOM, AND, HOGAN AND VEST, INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOOT DUE TO DEMURRER RULING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: QUENTIN KOPP; COURT REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, CSR, 4280

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HARRY HOM, BEATRICE HOM, and, HOGAN AND VEST, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: J. Scott Weaver, Esq. of West Bay Law, Wartelle, Weaver & Schreiber (415) 693-0504, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party. There are no other appearances. Counsel is appearing to have Order signed. Demurrer to the first cause of action is overruled. Defendant fails to show the governing period is one year and Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to support a rent ordinance violation under the applicable liberal pleading standard. The demurrer to sixth cause of action is sustained. Plaintiff must allege more than creation and affliction of debris with Defendant's knowledge and permission. Intentional inflection of emotional distress requires pleading of facts constituting extreme and outrageous behavior transcending bounds of decency. As desired, Plaintiff may file and serve a First Amended Complaint by April 27, 2009. If she does not, Defendants shall file and serve their answers by April 30, 2009. Order signed in open Court.(302KOPP/JW)Judge: Quentin Kopp; Court Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR, 4280

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2009 Text Ruling

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Moot due to demurrer ruling. Order signed in open Court.(302KOPP/JW)Judge: Quentin Kopp; Court Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR, 4280
